params._entryAmount: The exact amount (in token's smallest unit) required per entry
params._token: The ERC20 token address used for entries

enter(uint256).details: Caller must have approved this contract to spend `entryAmount` tokens

params.amount: The amount to deposit - must equal entryAmount exactly

selectWinners(uint8).details: Can only be called when contest is closed. Uses block.prevrandao for randomness.

closeContest().notice: Close the contest - stops deposits, enables winner selection

enter(uint256).notice: Enter the contest by depositing the exact entry amount

openContest().notice: Open the contest - allows new deposits

selectWinners(uint8).notice: Select up to 5 random winners and distribute 20% of pool to each
